targetIdentity.targetName: EZ2C Revolving Dot Torture Training Drill

stageDefinitions.label: Dots 3 & 4
stageDefinitions.guidance: Stage 3: Dots 3 & 4 — Fire 1 on Dot 3 and 1 on Dot 4, repeat x4.

stageDefinitions.label: Dot 5
stageDefinitions.guidance: Stage 4: Dot 5 — Fire 5 shots, strong hand only.

stageDefinitions.label: Dots 6 & 7
stageDefinitions.guidance: Stage 5: Dots 6 & 7 — Fire 3 on Dot 6 and 3 on Dot 7, repeat x2.

stageDefinitions.label: Dot 8
stageDefinitions.guidance: Stage 6: Dot 8 — Fire 5 shots, support hand only.

stageDefinitions.label: Dots 9 & 10
stageDefinitions.guidance: Stage 7: Dots 9 & 10 — Fire 5 on Dot 9, reload, fire 5 on Dot 10.

uteRouting.rulesSource: Revolving Dot Torture training drill profile: backend-owned stage package

officialRules: Only shots completely inside each numbered circle count.
courseOfFire: Stage 3: Dots 3 & 4 — Fire 1 on Dot 3 and 1 on Dot 4, repeat x4.
Stage 4: Dot 5 — Fire 5 shots, strong hand only.
Stage 5: Dots 6 & 7 — Fire 3 on Dot 6 and 3 on Dot 7, repeat x2.
Stage 6: Dot 8 — Fire 5 shots, support hand only.
Stage 7: Dots 9 & 10 — Fire 5 on Dot 9, reload, fire 5 on Dot 10.
instructionAuthority.intendedUse: Pistol marksmanship training drill variant for revolving-firearm practice.
passFailOrScoringRules: Only shots completely inside each numbered circle count.
Misses should be attributable by dot or stage when scored evidence includes stage context.

aimPointRules: Engage each numbered dot according to the backend stage package.
scoringZones: Each numbered circle is a scoring zone; official circle dimensions/positions require source verification.

minimumConfidenceRequirements: Target profile identity must be revolving_dot_torture_ez2c.
Scored evidence must support hit-to-dot/stage attribution before backend can calculate final score.

unknowns.neededSource: Official EZ2C Revolving Dot Torture target text or verified product source.
Official target geometry or verified measurement manifest.

sourceAudit.source: SCZN3 Revolving Dot Torture mission skeleton
sourceAudit.notes: Backend family skeleton uses target identity, stage package, recommended distance, and scoring rule. Geometry scoring remains pending official zone measurements.
